title: Luxury Perfume Bottle
summary: High-end fashion-magazine product shot of a crystal-cut perfume bottle on marble.
prompt: A premium product photograph of an elegant glass perfume bottle, faceted crystal-cut design with a gold metallic cap, amber-colored liquid inside catching the light. Soft drift of pink rose petals scattered around the base. Marble countertop, ultra-clean off-white backdrop, soft directional studio lighting from the upper left with a hint of shadow. High-end fashion magazine aesthetic, ultra-sharp focus, square 1:1 composition.
